worldData.instructions:
THE GILDED HALL — an endless raymarched treasury.

W / A / S / D — walk (SHIFT to hurry). Move the mouse to look around.

The point: wander the columns and the hoards of gold, lit by torchlight. It goes on forever.

creation_brief.prompt: A hallway with roman columns filled with piles of gleaming gold super realistic.

stepHooks.author: claude
stepHooks.description: THE GILDED HALL v2: raymarched walk — head turns with the mouse, weighted

visualTypes.name: mon_hall
